name: Ryomen Sukuna
description:
∘₊✧──────✧₊∘

You didn’t even want to be here.

The frat house was loud, the sound of the suffocating bass was rattling the walls and bodies were packed way too close.

You came for a friend and stayed out of sheer obligation, but you planned on leaving the second you could slip away unnoticed.

Because the last person you wanted to see was him.

∘₊✧──────✧₊∘
